[custom-keybindings/custom0]
binding='<Control><Alt>Delete'
command='gnome-system-monitor'
name='gnome-system-monitor'

[custom-keybindings/custom1]
binding='<Control><Alt>y'
command='gnome-terminal'
name='gnome-terminal'

[custom-keybindings/custom2]
binding='<Control><Alt>bracketright'
command='flatpak run com.raggesilver.BlackBox'
name='alpine'

[custom-keybindings/custom3]
binding='<Control><Alt>s'
command='pactl set-default-sink alsa_output.usb-Jieli_Technology_UACDemoV1.0_45414534343616FF-00.analog-stereo'
name='speakers'

[custom-keybindings/custom4]
binding='<Control><Alt>h'
command='pactl set-default-sink alsa_output.usb-SteelSeries_Arctis_Pro_Wireless-00.stereo-game\n'
name='headphones'

[custom-keybindings/custom5]
binding='<Primary><Alt>h'
command='pactl set-default-sink alsa_output.usb-SteelSeries_Arctis_Pro_Wireless-00.stereo-game'
name='Switch to headphones'

[custom-keybindings/custom91]
binding='<Control><Alt>t'
command='gnome-terminal --profile=fedora-toolbox'
name='Gnome Terminal - fedora-toolbox'

[custom-keybindings/custom92]
binding='<Primary><Alt>u'
command='gnome-terminal --tab-with-profile=ubuntu-toolbox-22'
name='Gnome Terminal - ubuntu-toolbox-22'

[custom-keybindings/custom93]
binding='<Control><Alt>f'
command='gnome-terminal --tab-with-profile=fedora-toolbox'
name='Gnome Terminal - fedora-toolbox-37'
